category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Sierra Leone.

title.en: China-to-Sierra Leone EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入塞拉利昂：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入獅子山：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Sierra Leone SLSB / EWRC / EDSA requirements, IEC 61851 safety and EMC standards, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, EDSA grid-connection and project-approval requirements, OCPP interoperability, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines. Sierra Leone's EV market is at an extremely nascent stage; severe grid deficits and very low electrification rates make widespread EV charging deployment currently impractical outside of off-grid or hybrid-solar pilot contexts.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与塞拉利昂SLSB / EWRC / EDSA要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC标准、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、EDSA并网及项目审批要求、OCPP互操作，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。塞拉利昂电动汽车市场处于极早期阶段；严重的电网缺口和极低的电气化率使得除离网或混合太阳能试点外，大规模电动汽车充电部署目前不切实际。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與獅子山SLSB / EWRC / EDSA要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC標準、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、EDSA併網及項目審批要求、OCPP互操作，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。獅子山電動汽車市場處於極早期階段；嚴重的電網缺口和極低的電氣化率使得除離網或混合太陽能試點外，大規模電動汽車充電部署目前不切實際。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Sierra Leone, the practical gaps are substantial and the market context must be understood first: Sierra Leone has among the world's lowest electrification rates (approximately 26% nationwide, lower in rural areas as of 2023) and the national grid operated by EDSA faces severe generation deficits, making reliable AC grid-powered EV charging infrastructure largely impractical at scale today. The EV vehicle fleet is essentially non-existent for four-wheelers; two- and three-wheelers represent the most relevant near-term EV segment. Regulatory gate: Sierra Leone Standards Bureau (SLSB) is the conformity body adopting IEC-aligned standards; the Electricity and Water Regulatory Commission (EWRC) regulates electricity services; EDSA is the national utility. For any charger deployed, the confirmed technical gaps are: (1) connector redesign from GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 (AC) / CCS2 (DC) — physically incompatible; (2) IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23 safety evidence rather than GB/T 18487 alone; (3) IEC 62196 and IEC 61000-series EMC evidence for SLSB conformity; (4) EDSA connection approval for any grid-tied installation; (5) IP55+ enclosure for Sierra Leone's tropical climate with high humidity and dust; (6) for any networked charger, OCPP back-office integration; (7) solar-hybrid or off-grid design considerations given grid instability. Chinese exporters should treat Sierra Leone as a long-horizon frontier market and engage SLSB and EWRC directly before any shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入塞拉利昂时，实务差距是巨大的，须首先理解市场背景：塞拉利昂是全球电气化率最低的国家之一（截至2023年全国约26%，农村地区更低），国家电网由EDSA运营，面临严重的发电缺口，使得大规模可靠交流电网供电的电动汽车充电基础设施在今天基本不切实际。四轮电动汽车保有量几乎为零；两轮和三轮电动车是近期最相关的电动汽车细分市场。监管门槛：塞拉利昂标准局（SLSB）是采用IEC标准体系的合格评定机构；电力和水务监管委员会（EWRC）监管电力服务；EDSA是国家电力公司。对于任何已部署的充电桩，已确认的技术差距包括：(1) 接口从GB/T 20234改为IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）/ CCS2（直流）——两者物理上不兼容；(2) 须提供IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23安全证据，而非仅依赖GB/T 18487；(3) SLSB合格评定须提供IEC 62196及IEC 61000系列EMC证据；(4) 任何并网安装须获EDSA接入许可；(5) 塞拉利昂热带气候（高湿度和扬尘）要求IP55+防护等级；(6) 联网充电桩须支持OCPP后台集成；(7) 考虑到电网不稳定，须纳入太阳能混合或离网设计方案。中国出口商应将塞拉利昂视为长期潜力的前沿市场，并在任何出货前直接联系SLSB和EWRC。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入獅子山時，實務差距是巨大的，須首先理解市場背景：獅子山是全球電氣化率最低的國家之一（截至2023年全國約26%，農村地區更低），國家電網由EDSA運營，面臨嚴重的發電缺口，使得大規模可靠交流電網供電的電動汽車充電基礎設施在今天基本不切實際。四輪電動汽車保有量幾乎為零；兩輪和三輪電動車是近期最相關的電動汽車細分市場。監管門檻：獅子山標準局（SLSB）是採用IEC標準體系的合格評定機構；電力和水務監管委員會（EWRC）監管電力服務；EDSA是國家電力公司。對於任何已部署的充電樁，已確認的技術差距包括：(1) 接口從GB/T 20234改為IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）/ CCS2（直流）——兩者物理上不兼容；(2) 須提供IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23安全證據，而非僅依賴GB/T 18487；(3) SLSB合格評定須提供IEC 62196及IEC 61000系列EMC證據；(4) 任何併網安裝須獲EDSA接入許可；(5) 獅子山熱帶氣候（高濕度和揚塵）要求IP55+防護等級；(6) 聯網充電樁須支持OCPP後台集成；(7) 考慮到電網不穩定，須納入太陽能混合或離網設計方案。中國出口商應將獅子山視為長期潛力的前沿市場，並在任何出貨前直接聯繫SLSB和EWRC。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SLSB scope determination, EWRC approval, EDSA connection consent, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Sierra Leone conformity assessment rules, EDSA connection requirements, IEC standard editions, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation. The Sierra Leone EV market is at an extremely nascent stage; all information should be independently verified with SLSB, EWRC, and EDSA.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SLSB适用范围裁定、EWRC批准、EDSA接入许可、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行塞拉利昂合格评定规则、EDSA接入要求、IEC标准版本及安装规则。塞拉利昂电动汽车市场处于极早期阶段，所有信息均应向SLSB、EWRC和EDSA独立核实。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SLSB適用範圍裁定、EWRC批准、EDSA接入許可、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行獅子山合格評定規則、EDSA接入要求、IEC標準版本及安裝規則。獅子山電動汽車市場處於極早期階段，所有信息均應向SLSB、EWRC和EDSA獨立核實。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
